name: wiki-mcp
description: SiYuan wiki MCP server — bundled for Claude Code plugin

scripts.release: node -e "const v=process.env.npm_config_version||process.argv[1]; if(!v){console.error('Usage: npm run release --version=X.Y.Z');process.exit(1);} const fs=require('fs'); ['../.claude-plugin/plugin.json','./package.json'].forEach(f=>{const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));d.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(d,null,2)+'\n');console.log('Updated',f,'to',v);})"
